title: gilia ophthalmoides subsp. clokeyi
intro: Gilia ophthalmoides subsp. clokeyi, also known as Clokey's gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gilia ophthalmoides subsp. clokeyi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
